title: Batch API
summary: Guide to processing large asynchronous request sets with the Batch API for offline or bulk workflows.
raw:
Batch API

The Batch API lets you submit a large file of requests for asynchronous processing when latency is less important than throughput.

It is useful for offline classification, backfills, large-scale summarization, and other bulk jobs that can complete later.

Workflow

Upload an input file, create a batch job, wait for completion, and then download the output file with per-request results.

batch = client.batches.create(input_file_id="file_123", endpoint="/v1/responses", completion_window="24h")

Batch jobs can reduce operational overhead when you need to process thousands of requests outside the interactive path.
